fields.name: General Medicine
fields.description: Comprehensive general health consultation for fever, cold, infections, and common illnesses. Available at Gracie Hospital, Hebbal, Mysore.

fields.name: Cardiology
fields.description: Expert heart care — ECG, echo, consultations for chest pain, BP management, and cardiac conditions.

fields.name: Orthopaedics
fields.description: Treatment for bone, joint, and muscle problems including fractures, knee pain, back pain, and sports injuries.

fields.name: Gynaecology & Obstetrics
fields.description: Women's health services including prenatal care, PCOS, menstrual issues, and delivery support.

fields.name: Paediatrics
fields.description: Child healthcare for newborns to teenagers — vaccinations, growth monitoring, and illness treatment.

fields.name: Dermatology
fields.description: Skin, hair and nail treatments — acne, eczema, psoriasis, hair fall, and cosmetic consultations.
